page.content: The net profit margin is expected to rise from 10.0% to a robust level, driven by strategic initiatives aimed at enhancing service delivery. Moreover, the change in environmental remediation costs is projected to be 1.1%, indicating a gradual but steady improvement. The notes section highlights that the target for wastewater treatment efficiency is set at 30.0, while the 2024 Actual for this metric is anticipated to reach 1.5. These figures collectively illustrate the ongoing efforts and strategic investments dedicated to fostering environmental sustainability in the region.
